name: Bug Fix Squad
description: A focused team dedicated to triaging, reproducing, fixing, and verifying software defects across the frontend and backend with thorough code review.

agents.role: Triages incoming bug reports, reproduces issues, identifies root causes, and documents reproduction steps
Diagnoses and resolves client-side defects including UI glitches, state management issues, and rendering bugs
Investigates and patches server-side bugs including API errors, data inconsistencies, and performance regressions
Verifies bug fixes, writes regression tests, and confirms that patches do not introduce new defects
Reviews fix implementations for correctness, potential side effects, and adherence to coding standards
